title: Ascendant Coins
description: Coin Currency mod inspired by the Ascendance of a Bookworm Series
body:
Coin Currency mod inspired by the Ascendance of a Bookworm Series
Mod adds 9 coins using vanilla materials.
- Small Copper
- Medium Copper
- Large Copper
- Small Iron
- Large Iron
- Small Gold
- Large Gold
- Small Netherite
- Large Netherite

Uses base 9 for value starting at 1 [1,9,81,729, 6561, etc ](configurable)
Default recipes are also base 9 (so edit recipes if you change configs)
